M

main(String[]) - Static method in class controller.Main
The main method that starts the application.
main(String[]) - Static method in class JBlackJack
 
Main - Class in controller
The Main class initializes and starts the application for the blackjack game.
Main() - Constructor for class controller.Main
 
menuPanel - Variable in class controller.MenuPanelController
Instance of MenuPanel used in this controller
menuPanelController - Variable in class controller.LoadGameController
The singleton instance of MenuPanelController for controlling menu interactions.
MenuPanelController - Class in controller
Controller class for managing interactions with the menu panel.
MenuPanelController() - Constructor for class controller.MenuPanelController
Private constructor to prevent direct instantiation.
model - package model
 
modelManager - Variable in class controller.GamePanelController
Instance of ModelManager used to manage the game model.
modelManager - Variable in class controller.LoadGameController
The singleton instance of ModelManager for managing game data.
modelManager - Variable in class controller.NewGamePanelController
Instance of ModelManager for accessing application data.
ModelManager - Class in model
The ModelManager class manages the state and logic of the blackjack game.
ModelManager() - Constructor for class model.ModelManager
Constructs a ModelManager.
money - Variable in class model.Player.Builder
 
money - Variable in class model.Player
The amount of money the player has.
money(int) - Method in class model.Player.Builder
Sets the starting money for the player.
